race.comment: ESTIVAL (8) is drawn sticky but has impressed at the trials, showing a good turn of foot to win a recent Seymour trial, and she might have improved between campaigns. MORDU (1) settled towards the rear on debut at Wangaratta but warmed nicely in the lane to work home into third. Is sure to have come on from that and if he can settle close this time he can get the job done. RIP CURRENT (3) was too bad too be true fresh and has since been freshened with 37 days, kept up to the mark with a Seymour jumpout. Can improve sharply second-up. Debutant PANINO (2) jumped out soundly on the Heath and looks best of the rest.
